false_positive_snippets.description: Using XMLParser to parse untrusted XML data is known to be vulnerable to XML attacks. Replace XMLParser with the equivalent defusedxml package, or make sure defusedxml.defuse_stdlib() is called.

8 from xml.etree.ElementTree import XMLParser
